title: deparia deflexa
intro: Deparia deflexa, also known as the flexible lady fern, is a species of fern native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Deparia deflexa include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various digestive issues. Deparia deflexa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
